verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Jesus said that in the midnight hour There'll be Virgins who'll hear the great Cry Behold He cometh, rise and trim your lamps Go and meet Him, the Bridegroom is nigh

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: But some discovered they were lacking the oil They were empty with no light to see So I ask You, dear Lord, Come and fill me with Your Spirit, Keep me burning for You is my plea.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I wanna be burning, Burning the midnight oil With my lamp all trimmed and glowing A vessel full of the Holy Ghost I will shine the light through the night To the Word I must be loy'l There is a virgin Bride Burning the midnight oil

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Sometimes I really get to wondering why It's a struggle to get down and pray I feel the spirit of complacency We're surrounded by the darkest days

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: I am running with a burning desire I'll keep holding up this light of mine I am working day and night with the ones who hold the promise, It is time for us to rise and shine

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: I wanna be burning, Burning the midnight oil With my lamp all trimmed and glowing A vessel full of the Holy Ghost I will shine the light through the night To the Word I must be loy'l There is a virgin Bride Burning the midnight oil

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: We'll work till Jesus comes We'll work till Jesus comes We'll work till Jesus comes Burning the midnight oil.
